---
title: "test_catalog_check_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_catalog_check_empire.py"
loc: 63
complexity: 3
logic_score: 5.72
style_score: 2.86
intel_score: 7.75
overall_score: 4.07
---

## Intent
The `test_catalog_check_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on setup_environment, run_script, test_successful_index_building_and_retrieval, assert_step, test_handling_of_no_results_path_implicit_check. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via setup_environment, run_script, test_successful_index_building_and_retrieval, assert_step, test_handling_of_no_results_path_implicit_check. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 2.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pytest](file://pytest)

### Exports
- `setup_environment`
- `run_script`
- `test_successful_index_building_and_retrieval`
- `assert_step`
- `test_handling_of_no_results_path_implicit_check`
